use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MODERATE-TO-SEVERE PRURITUS ASSOCIATED WITH CHRONIC KIDNEY DISEASE (CKD-AP) IN ADULTS UNDERGOING HEMODIALYSIS (HD)

indications.text:
KORSUVA is indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe pruritus associated with chronic kidney disease
(CKD-aP) in adults undergoing hemodialysis (HD).
Limitations of Use
KORSUVA has not been studied in patients on peritoneal dialysis and is not recommended for use in this
population.

KORSUVA is indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe pruritus associated with chronic kidney disease
(CKD-aP) in adults undergoing hemodialysis (HD).
Limitations of Use
KORSUVA has not been studied in patients on peritoneal dialysis and is not recommended for use in this
population.
